system.description:
Discipline: Dianxue
Skill: Arm Strike against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 4

You quickly strike a meridian point on the top of your opponent’s head and eyes, halting the flow of Qi to through the liver. On a Success the person feels very hot when physically active. This imposes a -1d10 penalty to any skill requiring movement or exertion for one hour per Rank of Dianxue. Cathartic: The target suffers the above effects plus is overcome with stiffness and pain of the joints, taking a -1d10 penalty per Rank of Dianxue to Athletics and Detect for one hour. The person also becomes irrational, acquiring a random mental affliction from the Mental Affliction Table in CHAPTER FOUR for one day per Rank of Dianxue. This can also be used to reverse the effects of the Technique. Inverted Three Point Strike immobilizes foes.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.targetEffects: -1d10 to any skill requiring movement or exertion for 1 hour per Rank of Dianxue
system.catharticTargetEffects: As normal, plus Athletics and Detect suffer -1d10 per Rank of Dianxue for 1 hour and target gains a random Mental Affliction for 1 day per Rank of Dianxue
